sources.title: TARZAN AND THE HUNTRESS 1947 Colorized
sources.description: To equip the American zoos with as many animals as possible, a cruel trio of big game hunters team up with an unexpected ally, threatening the African fauna. Will Tarzan allow the fiendish huntress to pillage the jungle?

metadata.Plot: A shortage of zoo animals after World War II brings beautiful animal trainer Tanya, her financial backer and her cruel trail boss to the jungle. After negotiating a quota with the native king, they take more animals than allowed. Tarzan intervenes.
metadata.Writer: Jerome Gruskin, Rowland Leigh, Edgar Rice Burroughs
metadata.Actors: Johnny Weissmuller, Brenda Joyce, Johnny Sheffield
